name: BlackRock, Inc.
summary: BlackRock, Inc. is a leading publicly traded investment management firm with $14.0 trillion in AUM as of December 31, 2025. It offers equity, fixed income, multi-asset, alternatives, digital assets, and cash management strategies via mutual funds, iShares ETFs, separate accounts, and collective trust funds. BlackRock also provides technology and subscription services including Aladdin, Aladdin Wealth, eFront, Preqin, and Cachematrix to institutional and retail clients in over 100 countries.

products.name: iShares ETFs
products.description: Exchange-traded funds offered across broad asset classes globally.

products.name: Aladdin
products.description: Investment and risk management technology platform offered to institutional and wealth management clients.

products.name: Aladdin Wealth
products.description: Wealth management-focused version of the Aladdin investment technology platform.

products.name: eFront
products.description: Technology platform supporting private markets investment management and reporting.

products.name: Preqin
products.description: Data and analytics platform for alternative assets.

products.name: Cachematrix
products.description: Technology platform for cash management and liquidity solutions.

products.name: Open-end mutual funds
products.description: Pooled investment vehicles offered directly and through intermediaries.

products.name: Closed-end mutual funds
products.description: Pooled investment vehicles offered directly and through intermediaries.

products.name: Separate accounts
products.description: Individually managed investment accounts for institutional and retail clients.

products.name: Collective trust funds
products.description: Pooled investment vehicles primarily for tax-exempt institutional clients.
